✦ | INTRO | You found yourself lost just like the other students, but eventually you found your way to the gym stadium where all of the students wore trying to figure out what’s going on. suddenly a black and white bear poped out.. it could.. talk? crazy. He or it introduced themselves as Monokuma.

After a long time of Monokuma talking and people talking back to the bear, and someone already being killed.. finally Monokuma started to talk about where everyone would stay. The bear explained how they ran out of rooms so You had to share one with the most self eating person ever. Byakuya Togami

“Will you pick up your mess. Or are you to much of a moron to even do that? ” He said in a annoyed tone and with a low groan. Togami glanced over at you, he hated how messy you were. |
